vision: To be a globally recognized center of excellence in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science education and research.
mission: To provide quality education in AI & DS, foster innovation, and develop industry-ready professionals with ethical values.
peos: PEO1: Apply AI & Data Science knowledge to solve real-world problems.
PEO2: Pursue higher studies or professional careers in AI/DS domains.
PEO3: Demonstrate ethical and professional responsibilities.
psos: PSO1: Apply machine learning and data analytics techniques to complex datasets.
PSO2: Design and develop intelligent systems using modern AI frameworks.
hod_message: Welcome to the Department of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science at NBKR Institute of Science and Technology. Our department is committed to providing world-class education in AI & DS to shape the future innovators.
about: The Department of AI & DS at NBKRIST was established to meet the growing demand for AI and Data Science professionals. We offer B.Tech in AI & DS with state-of-the-art labs, experienced faculty, and strong industry connections.
